Metadata.siteDescription: Software and AI engineer with more than 10 years of experience designing complex financial, healthcare, and enterprise platforms, with strong expertise in MCP and RAG systems.

HomePage.title: Software and AI Engineer for financial and enterprise systems.
HomePage.description: I design and build distributed backends, event-driven platforms, modern web systems, and AI-powered products with a focus on performance, reliability, and long-term maintainability.
HomePage.profileDescription: Public assets are organized under /public for direct access. The CV is already available here, and the profile photo slot is ready under public/images/profile/.
HomePage.engineering: Fintech infrastructure, healthcare financial systems, enterprise platforms, modern APIs, and AI systems built with MCP and RAG.
HomePage.music: Electronic music, artist releases, and band projects published under dnl1 and Undercolin.

AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: Engineering background, technical focus, AI systems expertise, and leadership experience.
AboutPage.heading: Danilo Gomes
AboutPage.profileDescription: Access the latest CV and profile materials directly from the portfolio.
AboutPage.paragraph1: I am a software and AI engineer with more than 10 years of experience designing and building complex financial and enterprise systems. My work spans fintech infrastructure, healthcare financial systems, enterprise platforms, distributed architectures, high-performance data processing, and AI-powered products.
AboutPage.paragraph2: Across that work I have built backend services, modern web platforms, APIs, and AI workflows using technologies such as C#, .NET, Python, FastAPI, Flask, TypeScript, React, and Next.js. I also work extensively with messaging and infrastructure patterns including RabbitMQ, gRPC, RPC, event-driven systems, and modern AI patterns such as MCP and RAG.
AboutPage.value1: Distributed systems, microservices architecture, and event-driven systems
AboutPage.value2: High-performance backend services, system modernization, and large-scale data processing
AboutPage.value3: Technical leadership across backend, platform, full-stack delivery, and applied AI systems
AboutPage.education3Institution: ETEC - Escola Técnica Estadual de São Paulo

ProjectsPage.title: Company Projects

ProjectsPage.heading: Company Projects
ProjectsPage.intro: A curated set of systems and platforms that show how I approach architecture, modernization, delivery, and business-critical engineering work.
ProjectsPage.summaryDescription: I use these projects to highlight technical depth rather than resume bullets: the business context, the architectural approach, the technologies used, and the engineering impact.

PersonalProjectsPage.title: Personal Projects
PersonalProjectsPage.description: Personal systems built with product intent, technical depth, and real operational problems in mind.
PersonalProjectsPage.heading: Personal Projects
PersonalProjectsPage.intro: A set of personal systems built as serious engineering work, shaped by concrete workflows, product constraints, and practical operational needs.
PersonalProjectsPage.summaryDescription: These systems are in production today, built to solve real problems with a focus on domain design, maintainability, and usability. If you are interested in any of them, get in touch.

ExperiencePage.heading: Engineering Experience
ExperiencePage.intro: A timeline of systems built, architecture decisions made, teams led, and business-critical platforms shaped over more than 10 years in software engineering.
ExperiencePage.summaryDescription: I work across backend engineering, distributed systems, platform modernization, AI systems, and engineering leadership. The work below emphasizes architecture, ownership, and technical impact.

CaseStudiesPage.title: Technical Case Studies
CaseStudiesPage.description: Deep technical case studies focused on architecture decisions, real-world constraints, and engineering impact.
CaseStudiesPage.heading: Technical Case Studies
CaseStudiesPage.intro: A collection of technical case studies covering financial systems, enterprise architecture, healthcare infrastructure, and modern product platforms.
CaseStudiesPage.summaryDescription: These case studies are written as engineering narratives: what made the system hard, how the architecture was shaped, where the risks lived, and what technical impact came from the decisions.
